title: iria pentaptera
intro: Iria pentaptera, also known as the five-angled leaf or pentaphyllon, is a plant species found in tropical regions. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Iria pentaptera include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
